titleStmt.title: SII 39.101: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 101. (A.R. No. 101 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SIVADHARMAPURIŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME TEMPLE, SUNDARPĀṆḌYA DĒVA-20+1ST = 21ST YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of taxes due imposed on the lands called Vēlārkuḍikkāḍu and Karikālachōḻappallavaraiyaṉ kuḍikāḍu, to the temple (Vide No. 85 above) of Śivadharamīśvara-muḍaiya-nāyaṉār at Tirukkōḷakkuḍi for the maintenance by the Signatories like Vānādhirāyaṉ, Aṟivāḍaṉ mūvēndavēlāṉ, Udaiya-Divākara mūvēndavēlaṉ, Prākrama mūvēndavēḷāṉ etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kāṅkayaṉOlaitirukkoḷakkuṭi
Uṭaiyār śrīvadharmmiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār śrī koyil śrī ru
dra śrī māheśvararum śrī kāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum kaṇṭu Iḷai
yāttakkuṭi namaṉkuṭi Uṭaiyār vikramapāṇṭiya muventa
veḷāṉum kulacekarap pallavataraiyanum kaḷappāḷaṉum vi
ṟṟa namaṉ kuṭippāl veḷār kuṭikāṭu muṟṟum kunṟattūruṭaiya
n tiripuvaṉa kaṅkaṉuḷḷiṭṭār viṟṟa karikāla coḻa pallavatarai
yaṉ kuṭikkāṭu muṟṟum Ivarkaḷ viṟṟa vilai Ōlaiyil Eppaṭiyile vi
laiyāvatākavum Ikkuṭikāṭukaḷukku kaṭamai Antarāyam viniyo
kamum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa varikaḷumuṭpaṭa Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku naṭappa
tāka Oru sandhikku tiruppaṭimāṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅ
kaḷ celvatāka tantom śrī sundrapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu
2 10 Āvatin Etirāmāṇṭu mutal candrādityavaṟ celvatāka Ippa
ṭi kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷkaḥ Ivai kāṅkayaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku vāṇata tārayaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Aṟivāṭāṇa muventa veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Udaya divākaramuventa veḷān Eḻu
ttu Ivai parākrama pāṇṭiya muventa veḷān Eḻuttu I
tu śrī māheśvararakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 39.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
